svg.text: $ npm run draft -- --type demand-letter --jurisdiction ZA --tone assertive --facts examples/late-payment.za.json --output outputs/late-payment.za.md

svg.text: - Jurisdiction profile ZA is marked experimental; human legal review is required.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: - Confirm whether the matter falls under statute, contract, delict, labour, consumer, credit, or constitutional law.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: - Check prescription, jurisdiction, and forum before sending.
